svg.text: [ANIM] Row hover: bg #141920, 80ms ease-in. Arrow → slides 4px right on hover. Click → navigate to /paths/{group}/{pathHash}

PathTreeSidebar (left rail, 220px) · PathSearchInput (top bar) · PathFilterPanel (chips) · PathRow (each row) · VerbChip (colored pills) · MultiplicityBadge (gray pill "5 endpoints") · WebhookBadge (amber pill) · Pagination (bottom bar) · QuickStatsCard (right rail)
Hook: usePathList(group, filters, page) → GET /api/paths/{group}?page=1&size=50 · usePathTree(group) derives sidebar from cache · usePathFilters() drives URL params
